title: Fix Admin Orders List: Display Total, Add Pagination and Date Navigation
description:
Fix admin orders list page issues:

1. Order total amount not displayed in list
   - Add total_amount column to orders table
   - Format currency properly (RUB)

2. Missing pagination
   - Add cursor-based pagination (next_cursor, per_page)
   - Default per_page=20
   - Load more button or infinite scroll

3. Missing date navigation
   - Add date range filter (from/to)
   - Add quick filters: Today, This Week, This Month, All Time
   - Persist filter state in URL query params

Files to modify:
- frontend/pages/admin/orders/index.vue
- frontend/stores/adminOrdersStore.ts (if exists) or create
- API calls to GET /api/v1/admin/orders with query params
acceptance_criteria: Order total displayed in list with currency formatting
Quick date filters work (Today, Week, Month)
